---
title: "{{TITLE}}"
subtitle: "{{ANALYSIS_TYPE}}"
author: "{{AUTHOR}}"
date: "{{DATE}}"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles/qa-report.css
  docx:
    toc: false
  pdf:
    toc: false
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
params:
  process: "{{PROCESS}}"
  report_revision: "{{REVISION}}"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
options(width = 100)
```

# Decision

Replace this with the one-sentence QA decision.

# Evidence

| Evidence | Result | Interpretation |
|---|---:|---|
| Replace | 0 | Replace |

# Risk

Summarize the most important technical and operational risks.

# Recommended Action

State the action, owner, timing, and confirmation requirement.

# Notes

- Process or product: `r params$process`
- Revision: `r params$report_revision`
